THE CASE SETTLED AND THE STIPULATION IS AS FOLLOWS: THERE IS A STIP- ULATED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WHICH IS STAYED IF DFT. PAYS TOTAL OF $14,309.48 @ $100 PER MO. EFF. 12/20, INCREASING TO $300 MO EFF. 6/20/02 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. DFT. GETS 10 DAY GRACE PERIOD AND WILL BE GIVEN NTC. OF DEFAULT WITH 10 DAYS TO CURE IF PAYING LATE. PLNTF TO DISMISS ACTION W/P UPON FULL PAYMENT AND CITI BANK ACCOUNT #4271382483023004 WILL BE DEEM ED PAID IN FULL. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN ATTY. FEES AND COSTS. JUDGMENT IS NOT TO BE ENTERED.
